message:
refactor(codegen): Start unified NameGen migration for os.zig

Begin migration from scattered counters to unified NameGen system:

- Add fresh() and nextId() methods to NameGen for generic name generation
- Add freshName() and nextNameId() helpers to NativeCodegen
- Migrate pathBlock(), osSwitch(), genPathSplit(), genPathSplitext(),
  genPathGetsize() to use unified name IDs

Generated names now use consistent __m{id}_{hint} pattern instead of
hardcoded labels. This prevents name collisions in nested operations.

Still TODO: Migrate remaining ~20 hardcoded os_* block labels
